premises: ih : takeWhile (fun x => decide True) xs = xs
lemmas.conclusion: takeWhile (fun x => decide True) (x :: xs) = x :: xs

lemmas.conclusion: takeWhile (fun x => decide True) xs = xs
lemmas.statement: (xs : List α) : takeWhile (fun x => decide True) xs = xs
